questions.question: Select the best express Antonym of the given underlined word. The robust structure of the bridge ensured it could withstand heavy storms and earthquakes.
questions.explanation: A) Robust(adjective) – strong, resilient, sturdy, sound, solid मजबूत Antonym: Fragile(adjective) – Delicate, weak, easily broken. (नाजुक, कमजोर) Sturdy(adjective) – Strong and durable. (मजबूत, दृढ़) Tough(adjective) – Hard to break; resilient. (कठोर, सख्त) Durable(adjective) – Long-lasting. (टिकाऊ, स्थायी)

questions.question: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words. Madness or obsession with males
questions.explanation: D)Andromania(noun) – Madness or obsession with males पुरुषों के प्रति पागलपन या जुनून

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. The company ran about of stock due to unexpectedly high demand for the product
options: ran out of stock due to
ran around of stock due to
ran across of stock due to
ran on of stock due to
questions.explanation: A) 'ran about of stock due to' के बदले 'ran out of stock due to' का USE होगा क्योंकि 'run out of' एक Phrasal Verb है जिसका अर्थ है 'समाप्त हो जाना' (to exhaust the supply of something). 'ran out of stock due to' will be used instead of 'ran about of stock due to' because 'run out of' is a phrasal verb which means 'to exhaust the supply of something'. Run out of(phrasal verb): To finish a supply of something (स्टॉक खत्म हो जाना) Run about(phrasal verb): To move around without purpose (बिना उद्देश्य के इधर-उधर दौड़ना) Run around(phrasal verb): To be very busy doing many things (व्यस्त होना) Run on(phrasal verb): To continue for a long time (लंबे समय तक चलना)

questions.question: Select the best express Antonym of the given underlined word. Citizens began to rally behind the leader’s call for social reform.
questions.explanation: C) Rally(verb) – unite, gather, come together, support, mobilize समर्थन जुटाना Antonym: Disperse(verb) – Scatter, separate. (तितर-बितर करना) Relegate(verb) – Demote, downgrade. (पीछे हटाना) Annex(verb) – Take over, incorporate. (जोड़ना) Discourage(verb) – Dishearten, demotivate. (हतोत्साहित करना)

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph. P. It is a state in which the desired advantage enjoyed by another person causes one to feel a painful blend of inferiority, malevolence and indignation. Q. According to Bertrand Russell, next to worry, probably one of the most potent causes of unhappiness is envy. R. It is among the most universal and deep-seated of human passions. S. Envy, thus, is a destructive emotion.
questions.explanation: C)QRPS Q: This sentence introduces the main idea by mentioning envy and Bertrand Russell's view on its role in causing unhappiness.R: After the introduction of envy in Q, R follows logically by elaborating that envy is a universal and deep-seated emotion. The use of "it" refers to envy, making this the next logical step in the flow of ideas.P: This sentence defines envy in more detail, explaining what the emotion feels like. It follows naturally after the general description of envy in R.S: Finally, S concludes by describing envy as a destructive emotion, which ties up the explanation given in P.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate word to fill in the blank. He asked whether either of the brothers ­______________
questions.explanation: C) was at home' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि 'either of' के साथ Singular Verb का प्रयोग होता है। इसलिए सही उत्तर 'was at home' होगा। जैसे— Either of the two books is interesting.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word. After working for 16 hours straight, she was overcome with fatigue and could barely stand.
questions.explanation: D) Fatigue(noun) – exhaustion, weariness, tiredness, strain, burnout थकान Synonym: Exhaustion(noun) – Extreme tiredness, fatigue. (थकान) Energy(noun) – Vitality, liveliness. (ऊर्जा) Vigor(noun) – Strength, enthusiasm. (स्फूर्ति) Strength(noun) – Power, stamina. (ताकत)

questions.question: Select the INCORRECTLY spelt word
questions.explanation: A)The INCORRECTLY spelt word is 'Fourty'. The correct spelling is'Forty'.चालीस'

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. When I was on holiday,___________________
questions.explanation: C) 'all my luggage was stolen' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि luggage एक uncountable noun है, जिसके लिए 'some' या 'part' का प्रयोग गलत है, और 'whole' का प्रयोग 'were' के साथ भी गलत है क्योंकि luggage singular है।

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word. The city’s most infamous criminal was finally arrested after years of evading the police.
questions.explanation: B) Infamous(adjective) – notorious, disreputable, scandalous, ill-famed, dishonorable कुख्यात Synonym: Notorious(adjective) – Famous for something bad, disreputable. बदनाम Honorable(adjective) – Respectable, noble. माननीय Virtuous(adjective) – Righteous, moral. नैतिक Respectable(adjective) – Decent, dignified. आदरणीय

questions.question: Select the INCORRECTLY spelt word.
questions.explanation: D)The correct spelling of'Embarass'is 'Embarrass' शरमाया हुआ, घबराया हुआ.

questions.question: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the underlined words. I do not like him because he always disapproves the things or opinions of others.
questions.explanation: C)is critical of others(adjective) – expressing adverse or disapproving comments or judgments दूसरों की आलोचना करने वाला

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word. Under pressure, the old bridge began to buckle, forcing officials to close it.
questions.explanation: C) Buckle(verb) – yield, collapse, give in, submit, surrender झुक जाना Synonym: Collapse(verb) – Crumble, fall apart, give way. (गिर जाना) Strengthen(verb) – Reinforce, fortify, harden. (मजबूत करना) Repair(verb) – Fix, mend, restore. (मरम्मत करना) Expand(verb) – Enlarge, grow, extend. (फैलाना)

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. When pigs fly
questions.explanation: D)When pigs fly(idiom) – Something that will never happen ऐसी चीज़ जो कभी नहीं होगी।

questions.question: Select the option that will improve the underlined part of the given sentence. According to Greek mythology, Sipylus is holier city of Lydia.
questions.explanation: D) "holier" के स्थान पर "the holiest" का use होगा। यहां "Sipylus is (holier) city of Lydia" sentence में "Sipylus" को सबसे पवित्र शहर बताया गया है। "Holier" Comparative Degree है, लेकिन यहां Comparison (तुलना) की बात नहीं हो रही है, बल्कि Superlative Degree (अत्यधिक पवित्र) का उल्लेख हो रहा है। Superlative Degree का use करते समय Article "the" अनिवार्य होता है। "holier" should be replaced with "the holiest". In the sentence "Sipylus is (holier) city of Lydia," the intent is to express that Sipylus is the most holy city, not a comparison between two entities. "Holier" is the Comparative Degree, but the sentence requires the Superlative Degree (indicating the highest degree). When using the Superlative Degree, the article "the" is mandatory

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the given phrasal verb. The scientist’s groundbreaking discovery could set off a revolution in renewable energy technologies.
questions.explanation: D) Set off(phrasal verb) – Trigger, initiate, start, spark शुरूकरना Spontaneous(adjective) – Performed or occurring as a result of a sudden inner impulse or inclination without premeditation or external stimulus, impromptu, unplanned, unpremeditated. आकस्मिक Thoughtful(adjective) – Considerate, reflective, contemplative, meditative. विचारशील Illiterate(adjective) – Unable to read or write, uneducated, non-literate. निरक्षर

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. Beat around the bush.
options: To avoid getting to the point of an issue
questions.explanation: B)Beat around the bush(idiom) – To avoid getting to the point of an issue मुख्य मुद्दे पर आने से बचना

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. Most people are used in (A) / abiding by rules (B) / and good manners (C) / when cohabiting with others. (D)
questions.explanation: (A) 'are used in' के बदले'are used to'का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि 'used to' एक Phrasal Verb है जिसका अर्थ है 'आदी होना' और इसके बाद Gerund (V+ing) आता है; जैसे— He is used to working hard. 'are used to' will be used instead of 'are used in' because 'used to' is a Phrasal Verb which means 'accustomed to' and is followed by a Gerund (V+ing); Like— He is used to working hard.

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. The new Government has made a good beginning by (A) / turning its front on dubious statistics and (B) / officially endorsing the unflattering unemployment figures (C) / and marking down the GDP for the January-March quarter. (D)
options: The new Government has made a good beginning by
turning its front on dubious statistics and
officially endorsing the unflattering unemployment figures
and marking down the GDP for the January-March quarter
questions.explanation: 'B) turning its front on' के बदले'turning its back on'का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि 'turning its back on' एक सही idiom है जिसका अर्थ है "to reject or ignore something/someone." 'turning its back on'will be used instead of 'turning its front on' because 'turning its back on' is the correct idiom which means "to reject or ignore something/someone."

questions.question: For the four-sentence (S1 to S4) paragraph below, sentences S1 and S4 are given. From the options P, Q, R and S select the appropriate sentences for S2 and S3, respectively. S1: In recent years, India’s informal sector has faced significant challenges due to three major shocks: demonetisation in 2016, the rollout of the Goods and Services Tax regime in 2017 and the Covid-induced lockdown in 2020. P: Formalization of the economy is a complex and long term process that often requires to combine interventions on laws and regulations with those aiming to foster productivity and the ability to generate wealth. Q: These events have collectively led to the loss of 16.45 lakh jobs in seven years, according to the latest Annual Survey of Unincorporated Enterprises by the Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation. R: The survey highlights the fragility of unincorporated enterprises. S: The significant reduction of informality in some countries illustrates that achieving results is largely possible. S4: Operating outside the formal regulatory framework, such firms are particularly vulnerable to policy changes and economic disruptions.
questions.explanation: A) Q and R. S1 introduces the challenges faced by India’s informal sector due to three major events: demonetisation, GST, and the Covid-induced lockdown. Q logically follows as S2 by giving specific data about the impact of these events, particularly the loss of jobs, which directly supports the point made in S1. R fits as S3 because it explains the fragility of unincorporated enterprises, which aligns with the data mentioned in Q and leads naturally to S4, which discusses the vulnerability of these enterprises. P talks about the formalization of the economy, which is a different topic from the challenges faced by the informal sector. It doesn't directly connect with the job losses or fragility discussed in the paragraph. S discusses the reduction of informality in some countries, which is unrelated to the specific problems faced by India’s informal sector due to the three shocks mentioned. It shifts the focus from India's challenges to other countries’ success stories, which doesn’t align with the flow of the paragraph.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. The modern-day world is full of psychological disorders, (1) ____ health, mental tension, and many more problems. Likewise, the life of some people is like a mad rush from one work to another without any (2) ____. Besides, there are very few people in the world that care about their health more than their work or daily tasks. But there are ways by which we can restoreour health fully and morning walk is one of them. It can reduce the amount of health disorders and (3)____ the physical shape and state of the body, which protects us from many diseases.Besides, morning walk gives you energy, motivates you to avoid laziness, creates a positive mindset, it is good for your organs especially the heart, and it gives you time to (4)_____ your day. To sum it up, we can say that, morning walk is very important for the body. Also, it helps to keep the body and mind healthy. Besides, everyone, (5) ____ kids or elders should try tomake morning walk a part of their daily routine. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 1.
questions.explanation: C)'Poor'का प्रयोग यहाँ उचित है क्योंकि "poor" का अर्थ होता है 'खराब' या 'अस्वस्थ', जो इस वाक्य में मानसिक विकारों और स्वास्थ्य समस्याओं का संदर्भ देता है। वाक्य यह describe करता है कि आधुनिक दुनिया मानसिक विकारों और खराब स्वास्थ्य से भरी हुई है, इसलिए 'poor' सही विकल्प है। जबकि 'good' का अर्थ 'अच्छा', 'best' का अर्थ 'सबसे अच्छा', और 'strong' का अर्थ 'मजबूत' होता है, जो इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं है। 'Poor'is the correct choice because it means 'bad' or 'unhealthy', fitting the context of the sentence discussing mental disorders and health issues in the modern world. The sentence implies that the modern-day world is full of psychological disorders and poor health, making 'poor' the most suitable option. Whereas, 'good' means 'positive', 'best' means 'the most excellent', and 'strong' implies 'powerful', which are not appropriate in this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. The modern-day world is full of psychological disorders, (1) ____ health, mental tension, and many more problems. Likewise, the life of some people is like a mad rush from one work to another without any (2) ____. Besides, there are very few people in the world that care about their health more than their work or daily tasks. But there are ways by which we can restoreour health fully and morning walk is one of them. It can reduce the amount of health disorders and (3)____ the physical shape and state of the body, which protects us from many diseases.Besides, morning walk gives you energy, motivates you to avoid laziness, creates a positive mindset, it is good for your organs especially the heart, and it gives you time to (4)_____ your day. To sum it up, we can say that, morning walk is very important for the body. Also, it helps to keep the body and mind healthy. Besides, everyone, (5) ____ kids or elders should try tomake morning walk a part of their daily routine. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 2.
questions.explanation: C)Break'का use किया जाएगा क्योंकि यह वाक्य में जीवन की निरंतर व्यस्तता को describe करता है और यह बताता है कि बिना किसी रुकावट के जीवन एक कार्य से दूसरे कार्य तक एक "पागल दौड़" जैसा है। 'Break' का अर्थ होता है "रुकावट या विश्राम," जो यहाँ context में सही है। जबकि 'Stress' का अर्थ है "तनाव," जो इस संदर्भ में फिट नहीं बैठता क्योंकि यहाँ बात "विश्राम" की हो रही है। 'Fulfilling' का अर्थ होता है "संतोषजनक," लेकिन यह वाक्य के भाव के अनुसार फिट नहीं होता। 'Urgent' का अर्थ है "तत्काल," जो इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं है। 'Break'will be used because it fits the context of the sentence, which describes the life of some people as a continuous mad rush from one work to another without any pause. 'Break' means "a pause or interruption," which is appropriate here. Whereas, 'Stress' means "tension," which doesn't fit as the sentence is discussing "relaxation." 'Fulfilling' means "satisfying," but it doesn't align with the meaning here. 'Urgent' means "immediate," which is also incorrect in this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. The modern-day world is full of psychological disorders, (1) ____ health, mental tension, and many more problems. Likewise, the life of some people is like a mad rush from one work to another without any (2) ____. Besides, there are very few people in the world that care about their health more than their work or daily tasks. But there are ways by which we can restoreour health fully and morning walk is one of them. It can reduce the amount of health disorders and (3)____ the physical shape and state of the body, which protects us from many diseases.Besides, morning walk gives you energy, motivates you to avoid laziness, creates a positive mindset, it is good for your organs especially the heart, and it gives you time to (4)_____ your day. To sum it up, we can say that, morning walk is very important for the body. Also, it helps to keep the body and mind healthy. Besides, everyone, (5) ____ kids or elders should try tomake morning walk a part of their daily routine. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 3.
questions.explanation: D)'Improve'का use किया जाएगा क्योंकि 'Improve' का अर्थ होता है किसी चीज़ को बेहतर बनाना। इस वाक्य में बताया गया है कि मॉर्निंग वॉक स्वास्थ्य विकारों की संख्या को कम कर सकती है और शरीर के भौतिक आकार और स्थिति को सुधार सकती है। इसलिए, 'Improve' यहां सही विकल्प है। जबकि 'Deteriorate' का अर्थ है बिगाड़ना, 'Control' का अर्थ है नियंत्रित करना, और 'Ruin' का अर्थ है नष्ट करना। ये तीनों विकल्प इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं हैं क्योंकि वाक्य में सकारात्मक प्रभाव की बात हो रही है। 'Improve'will be used because it means to make something better. The sentence states that morning walks can reduce the number of health disorders and improve the physical shape and state of the body. Therefore, 'Improve' is the correct option here. On the other hand, 'Deteriorate' means to worsen, 'Control' means to regulate, and 'Ruin' means to destroy. These options do not fit in this context as the sentence discusses a positive effect.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. The modern-day world is full of psychological disorders, (1) ____ health, mental tension, and many more problems. Likewise, the life of some people is like a mad rush from one work to another without any (2) ____. Besides, there are very few people in the world that care about their health more than their work or daily tasks. But there are ways by which we can restoreour health fully and morning walk is one of them. It can reduce the amount of health disorders and (3)____ the physical shape and state of the body, which protects us from many diseases.Besides, morning walk gives you energy, motivates you to avoid laziness, creates a positive mindset, it is good for your organs especially the heart, and it gives you time to (4)_____ your day. To sum it up, we can say that, morning walk is very important for the body. Also, it helps to keep the body and mind healthy. Besides, everyone, (5) ____ kids or elders should try tomake morning walk a part of their daily routine. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 4.
questions.explanation: D)'Plan'का use होगा क्योंकि इसका अर्थ है दिन के लिए व्यवस्थित रूप से तैयारी करना या योजनाबद्ध तरीके से सोचना। passage में morning walk के फायदे बताए गए हैं, जिनमें दिन को व्यवस्थित करने का समय मिलना शामिल है। इसलिए, 'Plan' सही उत्तर है।'Forget' का अर्थ है भूल जाना, जो context में फिट नहीं होता। 'Break' का अर्थ है तोड़ना या विराम लेना, जो यहां उपयुक्त नहीं है। 'Ruin' का अर्थ है नष्ट करना या खराब करना, जो इस context से मेल नहीं खाता। Plan'will be used because it means to organize or think systematically about your day. The passage highlights the benefits of a morning walk, including giving time to plan your day, making 'Plan' the correct choice. 'Forget' means to not remember, which doesn't fit here. 'Break' means to stop or take a pause, which is not suitable in this context. 'Ruin' means to destroy or spoil, which doesn't align with the context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. The modern-day world is full of psychological disorders, (1) ____ health, mental tension, and many more problems. Likewise, the life of some people is like a mad rush from one work to another without any (2) ____. Besides, there are very few people in the world that care about their health more than their work or daily tasks. But there are ways by which we can restoreour health fully and morning walk is one of them. It can reduce the amount of health disorders and (3)____ the physical shape and state of the body, which protects us from many diseases.Besides, morning walk gives you energy, motivates you to avoid laziness, creates a positive mindset, it is good for your organs especially the heart, and it gives you time to (4)_____ your day. To sum it up, we can say that, morning walk is very important for the body. Also, it helps to keep the body and mind healthy. Besides, everyone, (5) ____ kids or elders should try tomake morning walk a part of their daily routine. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 5.
questions.explanation: D)'Whether'का use होगा क्योंकि 'whether' का अर्थ है विकल्प या परिस्थितियों के बीच चयन का mention करना। दिए गए वाक्य में, यह कहा जा रहा है कि 'बच्चे हों या बुजुर्ग' (kids or elders), दोनों के लिए सुबह की सैर जरूरी है। इस प्रकार 'whether' सही विकल्प है। जबकि: 'Some' का अर्थ है 'कुछ', जो इस संदर्भ में फिट नहीं होता। 'Neither' का अर्थ है 'न तो', जो negative विकल्प के लिए use होता है और यह यहाँ उचित नहीं है। 'Either' का अर्थ है 'या तो', जो विकल्प प्रस्तुत करता है लेकिन इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं है क्योंकि यहाँ दोनों विकल्पों को शामिल किया जा रहा है। Whether'will be used because it signifies a choice or alternatives. In the given sentence, it refers to "kids or elders," suggesting that morning walks are necessary for both groups. Thus, 'whether' is the most appropriate option. 'Some' means 'a few' and does not fit the context here. 'Neither' means 'not either', and it is used in negative contexts, which is not the case here. 'Either' means 'one of the two', but the sentence intends to include both options, making it incorrect.
